text: Jarvis, what are the calendar items for Friday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Friday, February 21. You have sprint planning at 10 AM, and Lily needs to be picked up from daycare.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Just wanted to mention that helping Ethan with his homework tonight. He is studying hard for the school spelling bee tomorrow. It is great to see him so engaged.
title: Kids School Update

text: Logged that. School projects are fun. Spelling bees build great vocabulary. I can quiz him on the word list if he wants. Let me know if he needs any more help.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Just wanted to mention that greg is asking for updates on the latest pilot run. We got beta feedback from clinics suggesting they need scheduling portal immediately. Anika is doing a great job managing the feedback.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. I can help with that. We should prioritize these clinic requests. Let's create a dedicated sub-task in the CareConnect backlog. I'll save this reasoning in our engineering scratchpad.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Tracking my weekly fitness metrics. I hit 18 miles of running this week. Will keep monitoring the metrics.
title: Health Update

text: Understood. Staying active is key. Great progress! The consistent stretching is keeping you stable. I'll monitor the sleep metrics tonight.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Screen time is always a negotiation. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that greg is asking for updates on the latest pilot run. Mentoring Anika Patel on how to handle Q4 planning tradeoffs with Greg. Let's see if we can optimize the code first.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've noted that. Encourage her to lead the next tradeoff discussion. It's a great growth opportunity for a junior PM. Let's verify this in the staging environment first.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Sarah and I are looking at home listings in Frisco online. We just signed the mortgage papers and closed on our Frisco house. Need to make a final decision soon.
title: Finance Update

text: Sure thing! I've compiled the spreadsheet numbers. Congratulations! Owning your home in Frisco is a major milestone for the family. Let me know when you want to execute.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick update: Helping Ethan with his homework tonight. He is asking lots of questions about exoplanet atmospheric compositions. He is really putting in the effort.
title: Kids School Update

text: Sure thing! Great update. That's a great interest. I can summarize the atmosphere of Venus in a kid-friendly way. I've logged this academic update.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Just had a quick look at the CareConnect backlog. We are hitting major bottleneck issues with /sms/send under load. We need to get this sorted before the Baylor pilot starts.
title: Work Update

text: Sure thing! Let's break this down. We should implement a connection pool or check the indexing on the underlying tables for /sms/send. I can prep some talking points for your meeting with Anika.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Tracking my weekly fitness metrics. The pediatrician says Lily is growing on track. Will keep monitoring the metrics.
title: Health Update

text: I've logged your vitals. Excellent news. The pediatric report is saved in Lily's folder. Keep stretching that knee!
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Jarvis, Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Screen time is always a negotiation. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that working on the roadmap slides for Q4. Anika Patel did a deep competitor analysis showing MyChart has patient onboarding. I want to make sure the team doesn't burn out.
title: Work Update

text: Interesting. Good focus area. This competitor data is a powerful lever. You can use it to justify keeping patient onboarding in the MVP. I can compile the competitor metrics if needed.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Calculating some savings estimates. They requested our W-2 and bank statements. Will talk this over with Sarah.
title: Finance Update

text: Refinancing is a great leverage point. I have prepared a checklist of documents in your shared folder. Ready to calculate more rates.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick journal entry for tonight. Lots of communication with Greg and Anika today. Ethan did great with his school homework. Ethan did great with his school homework. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
